LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-15-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MERCEDES-BENZ USA LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALI AMERIPOUR, Esq.of Theta Law Firm, LLP (Tel: 424-297-3103) for defendant Mercedes-Benz USA, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Mercedes-Benz USA LLC's unopposed motion to compel binding arbitration is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
